item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct judgment mode and treated the prompt as a metric trend and vendor-switch decision problem. It provided a concrete decision framework covering attribution, impact, remediation, vendor comparison, and staged rollout without firing triage or reframing it as repeated local repair pressure."}
